svg.aria-label: 小宗狮 中文笔顺 Loading 动画
svg.title: 小宗狮 中文笔顺 Loading 动画 - 中性灰
svg.desc: Text-only SVG loading animation. English is written in letter order; Chinese is written by character/stroke order. No logo is included. Visible text uses neutral gray #767676. Transparent background; no logo is included.
